ocr.text: In the Allianz SE report analyzing health insurance medical cost ratios over the years 2020, 2021, and 2022, we observe a
comprehensive overview of key financial metrics. The Medical Cost Ratio exhibited a steady decline from 85% in 2020 to 82%
in 2021, culminating at 79% in 2022, reflecting a significant change of -6.1%. The Claims Ratio followed a similar downward
trajectory, starting at 75% in 2020, decreasing to 73% in 2021, and reaching 70% in 2022, resulting in a change of -5.3%. The
Price to Earnings Ratio (P/E Ratio) demonstrated a gradual increase from 15.5 in 2020 to 16.0 in 2021 and further to 16.3 in
2022, indicating a 1.9% change over the period.
Year  2020  2021  2022  Change(%)
MedicalCostRatio  85%  82%  79%  -6.1%
ClaimsRatio  75%  73%  70%  -5.3%  OperatingMargin
P/ERatio  15.5  16.0  16.3  1.9%  CurrentRatio  1.2  1.1
1.3  18.2%  Debt/Equity  0.5  0.6  0.7  16.7%  ProfitMargin  10%
9%  8%  2.5%  NetIncome  £150M  £160M  £170M  6.3%  Total
The Current Ratio showed a slight decline from 1.2 in 2020 to 1.1 in 2021, while further analysis reveals a Current Ratio of 1.3
in 2022. The Debt to Equity Ratio increased from 0.5 in 2020 to 0.6 in 2021, and reached 0.7 in 2022, indicating a change of
16.7%. The Profit Margin remained stable at 10% across the reported years. The distribution of Net Income reflects a consistent
growth, starting at £150M in 2020, increasing to £160M in 2021, and rising to £170M in 2022, marking a change of 6.3%. In
summary, the data encapsulate a clear trend of decreasing ratios in both Medical Cost and Claims metrics, alongside a positive
trajectory in Net Income and P/E Ratio, indicative of improved operational efficiency and profitability within Allianz SE's
health insurance segment over the assessed years. The financial stability, as evidenced through the Current and Debt to Equity
Ratios, suggests a prudent approach in managing liabilities relative to equity, further reinforcing the company's resilience in the
insurance market. The trends observed are critical for stakeholders as they reflect Allianz SE’s adaptive strategies in navigating
the complexities of health insurance costs in an evolving economic landscape.
